programme.title: Seindah Cinta Mutiara - EP 25
programme.desc: This is the story of Mutiara, a woman who must fight hard to build a better life. Despite her efforts, she faces one challenge after another, forcing her to become even stronger in order to endure. Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara’s journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.title: Trek Selebriti - EP 4
programme.desc: Trek Selebriti is back with more engagin session featuring local celebrities. Joint hosts Keanu Azman and Ariel Azli as they explore the experinces that have shaped the invited celebrities into who they are today.

programme.title: 3 Mak Dara - EP 10
programme.desc: 3 Mak Dara follows Raja Azura, Sharifah Shahora and Rita Rudaini on a road trip across Malaysia in an RV. Through travel and activities, they share honest conversations about motherhood,friendship, careers, relationships, social media and personal growth, blending humour, emotion and inspiration in a relatable lifestyle series.

programme.title: Helo Jodoh - EP 7
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when a mysterious letter threatening Puan Rozy and her company. Cassandra finds ways to get close to Zack and succeeds.

programme.title: Helo Jodoh - EP 7
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when a mysterious letter threatening Puan Rozy and her company. Cassandra finds ways to get close to Zack and succeeds.

programme.title: Dendam Aurora - EP 36
programme.desc: A recording from Aurora forces Dr. Azzam to confront long-buried memories from the past. Meanwhile, Feroz keeps Putri Adrina captive as he pressures her to reveal the whereabouts of the money Engku Azhar’s stole.

programme.title: Mechamato S4 - EP 3
programme.desc: After discovering a pair of robot doors with the ability to open a two-way portal, Amato and his friends go on wild adventures during recess, only to find themselves stranded on a remote island. Now, they need to use their wits to make it back before class ends.

programme.title: Siapa Master? - EP 10
programme.desc: In Part 2 of the Fusion series, the two Masters will making fish and chips with a twist, Asian style burger and one of Singapores favourite dishes Tulang but in a surprisingly different style.

programme.title: Dendam Seorang Madu - EP 27
programme.desc: Rayhana appoints Akif as CEO after her resignation, a decision that angers Faris. Hanum and Imran’s latest attempt to kill Faris ends in failure.

programme.title: (Live) Berita 2026/2027
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Buka Kedai : Now in Tokyo - EP 3
programme.desc: Buka Kedai is a reality show that follows four Malaysian celebrities who travel to Japan, expecting a relaxing food review experience. However, their plans take an unexpected turn when they are confronted with a surprising twist that challenges them in ways they never anticpated.

programme.title: Uncle Bos Mama - EP 4
programme.desc: Fish is left confused as to why no one in the house respects her, and she feels as though her world is falling apart. Regretting her decision to leave Kuaci Media, she tries to get her job back in order to support her family financially.

programme.title: Malang Si Puteri - EP 12
programme.desc: After days of searching in Kuala Lumpur, Puteri finally finds Johan, but he avoids her. Exhausted, she collapses and later receives life-changing news that leaves her reeling.

programme.desc: Fred's worst nightmare comes true when an evil spirit possesses the Mystery Machine and turns his beloved van into an unrelenting monster.

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: When Leslie's petals begin falling off, he feels like his good looks are fading; Gumball and Darwin use everything they know about style and beauty to try and help him.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons fear the worst when they are summoned to a Town Hall meeting; but are surprised when they're offered a new house -- until they discover it's in a different state.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: No matter what Gumball does, Carmen thinks she knows better; when Gumball attempts to gain the moral high ground, but fails, his only option left is to bring Carmen down to his level.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons each complain about their horrible day and argue over who has the worst life; they agree to swap lives the next day to see who actually has it worse.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: During school's Career Day, Nicole and Yuki unite to impress their kids and show the world their full power only to learn where real power comes from.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Though he is the most brilliant supervillain the world has known, Megamind is the least successful. Thwarted time and again by heroic Metro Man, Megamind is more surprised than anyone when he actually manages to defeat his longtime enemy. But without Metro Man, Megamind has no purpose in life, so he creates a new opponent, who quickly decides that it's more fun to be a bad guy than a hero.

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 54
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 21
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. Dhani carries a heavy burden, but he faces serious challenges as his siblings resent him and each of them harbors their own complicated secrets.

programme.title: THEATER DRAMA : MURIDKU COMBLANG CINTAKU
programme.desc: A program drama FTV about love, friendship, family, happy, sad etc, played by popular actor and actress Indonesia.

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 48
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 22
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 22
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. She is forced to pretend to be in a relationship with Sena, a ketoprak street vendor. This fake relationship, meant to protect her reputation, becomes complicated when Sena is actually an undercover intelligence agent on a mission tied to his past—further intensified by conflicts i

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 95
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. However, fate brings her together with Pasha, a respectable man from a wealthy family. Unbeknownst to them, they were actually switched at birth. What will happen to Adisty and Pasha's lives?

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 127
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. Her life is simple but full of color thanks to one thing she truly loves: cooking. For Lala, the kitchen is not just a place to prepare ingredients. programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 49
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 23
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 23
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 96
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 56

programme.desc: She De and Man Ying found out that Hui Yun has been relying on plush toys to get over the death of her son. She De tries to help by forcing Hui Yun to say "I am good even without you" to the plush toys, but this causes her to breakdown instead.

programme.desc: Felicia Chin is the only female celebrity in the programme to ride solo, cycling from Sungai Duri all the way to Kuala Selangor, Malaysia. programme.title: Another Wok of Life - EP 19 / 人生酱美味

Zhen Bang accompanies Ah Hei when he reports to jail, while Buffett and Tian Yong remain suspicious of Zi Cheng and decide to probe his motives.

programme.title: Another Wok of Life - EP 20 / 人生酱美味
programme.desc: A video of Buffett reusing the soup base goes viral. News of Zhen Bang murdering his brother also resurfaces, and consumers begin to boycott Hui Tou Lu. Buffett decides to take the blame for the collective good, but Zhen Bang expresses his intention to hand the CCTV footage of their kitchen to the police. In fear of being imprisoned again, Zi Cheng stops him and finally admits his wrongdoings.....

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep06
